title: decaspermum microphyllum
intro: Decaspermum microphyllum is a species of plant in the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as a small-leaved myrtle. It is native to Australia, where it is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Decaspermum microphyllum is often prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments.
